description_long: This is a rectangular, individually wrapped snack bar with a glossy, crinkled exterior wrapper. The front of the package features a printed design with a product name and an image of a cross-section of the snack, suggesting a layered filling, possibly with chocolate and cream. The wrapper is primarily a light beige or cream color with some brown and gold accents, and the ends are sealed with a crimped edge. The back of the package displays nutritional and ingredient information in small text. The overall size and shape are typical for a single-serving snack bar, and the packaging appears to be made of a flexible plastic or foil laminate.
description: A glossy, beige snack bar in a crinkled plastic wrapper with product branding and a cross-section image on the front.
description_view_0: The snack bar is seen from the narrow side, showing the crimped end and a sliver of the wrapper's design.
description_view_1: The front view displays the product name, branding, and a cross-section image of the snack, with clear visual details.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side reveals the other crimped end and a partial view of the snack's cross-section graphic.
description_view_3: The back view shows the nutritional and ingredient information printed in small text across the wrapper.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a brand logo on the front of the wrapper, above the product name, in gold and brown colors, but the specific brand is not clearly legible.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the wrapper shows an image of a chocolate and cream layered snack, indicating a chocolate or cream flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the back of the wrapper in small text.
